Video.summary: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.
Video.title: The Gladiator

Video.summary: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.
Video.title: Howie Mandel's Big Deal

Video.summary: A close-knit community on Moorpar in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.
Video.title: Desperate Housedogs

Video.summary: Three canines with issues at a dog-friendly ad agency office; a border collie mix becomes excited and unresponsive to commands when in her owner's truck.
Video.title: Mad Dogs

Video.summary: Cesar comes to the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.
Video.title: A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet

Image.alt: A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet
A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet
A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet
A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet
A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet
A Dog and His Boy; Mobile Vet

Video.summary: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.
Video.title: Stuck in the Mirror

Video.summary: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.
Video.title: Gotti's Honor

Video.summary: Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.
Video.title: Grizzly Dogs

Video.summary: A couple of German shepherd pups with a shadowy obedience track records; a rescue dog with trust issues.
Video.title: Shadow Dogs

Video.summary: Cesar helps actress Rhona Mitra curb her bulldog's violent tendencies; a newly-wed couples Chihuahua assumes dominance over their sheltie mix.
Video.title: Honeymoon Hell

Video.summary: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.
Video.title: Caged Heat

Video.summary: NASA astronauts Suni Williams and Leland Melvin have worked on the International Space Station, but need Cesar's help with canine problems.
Video.title: Cesar, We Have a Problem

Video.summary: A professional dog groomer reaches out to Cesar for help with three of her toughest clients; Cesar helps a couple with their head-strong pitbull.
Video.title: Have Dog...Will Travel

Video.summary: Cesar Millan helps Suzie Dove Miles, who has recently adopted a Doberman who is fearful of literally everything.
Video.title: Afraid of the Bark

Video.summary: Cesar attempts to introduce Roscoe, an agoraphobic Akita who is too scared to leave the house and garden and has never been for a walk, to the outside world.
Video.title: Run Home Roscoe!

Video.summary: Cesar teams up with horse whisperer Pat Parelli to improve the behavior of the dogs and horses at a riding center; a schnauzer/poodle mix with separation anxiety and dog aggression.
Video.title: Cesar and the Horse Whisperer

Video.summary: Cesar Millan investigates the case of a bulldog named Bella who has become aggressive ever since her owner's five-month rehab stint.
Video.title: Bulldog on the Edge

Video.summary: Cesar joins forces with Jennifer McCarthy to examine the nature of wolf-dogs, the result of the cross-breeding of wolves and domestic dogs.
Video.title: Wolf-Dogs: Out of the Wild

Video.summary: A Weimaraner eats everything in sight; a yellow Lab's excess energy is expressed destructively; an Australian shepherd is unable to socialize with other dogs.
Video.title: Revved-Up Harley

Video.summary: A Wheaten terrier puppy bites when playing; a Jack Russell terrier jumps when the garbage disposal runs and lunges at the dishwasher; a Lab fears shiny floors.
Video.title: K-9 Phobia

Video.summary: Puppy mills produce millions of dogs; Ceaser works with an animal rights group to rescue and rehabilitate some pups.
Video.title: Inside Puppy Mills

Video.summary: A pit bull is aggressive toward people and dogs; a dachshund mix exhibits aggression at feeding time and when it comes time to trim his nails.
Video.title: Bad Blood

Video.summary: Old and new cases that show the process for adopting a dog, introducing one to the home, setting rules and boundaries and dealing with the loss of a pet.
Video.title: A Member of the Family

Video.summary: Family dogs brawl with each other; a dog torments a child; a five-legged miniature pinscher has an aggressive attitude.
Video.title: Saving Ryan
